text:
市街地の敵が撤退を開始したそうだ！
二人とも、よくやってくれた！
帰還してくれ！

それからストラトス！
単騎突撃は、お前にはまだ早い！
オレぐらいになってからだ！

The enemies in the City Area are making their
retreat! Well done, both of you! Head back to
your ship!

Oh, and, Stratos? It's still too early for you
to charge headlong into battle alone. You need
to get as good as I am first!
